    "Ice barrier membrane missing at eaves or low-slope areas in a cold climate zone.",
    "No underlayment visible that meets IRC R905 requirements for ice dam protection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work and issue non-compliance notice.",
    "Require installation of ice barrier membrane per manufacturer specifications and IRC R905 before further roofing work proceeds."
  ],
  "rationale": "In cold climates, IRC R905 and manufacturer specs mandate ice barrier underlayment to prevent water intrusion from ice dams. Missing barrier is a critical defect that will lead to leaks and structural damage under freeze-thaw conditions. Work is only rough-complete and already defective.",
